design_philosophy: Neo-Brutalism meets Modern Digital Agency. High contrast, bold typography, stark black-and-white base with a vivid Signal Red (#FF3333) used STRICTLY for primary CTAs to drive conversion. Asymmetric layouts break the generic tech-template feel, creating visual tension while focusing on 'Web Development' as the massive flagship service. Muted tones are used for secondary services to enforce stark hierarchy.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding. Containers must have internal padding (p-8 to p-12).

grid_modes.hero: Asymmetric text-heavy block vs negative space.
grid_modes.services: Bento 'Tetris' grid. 1 massive card for Custom Web Dev (col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2) and 3 smaller cards (md:col-span-4).
grid_modes.portfolio: Horizontal scrolling layout or asymmetric overlapping masonry.
grid_modes.process: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 with technical grid borders (border-r border-b).

surfaces.cards: Sharp corners (rounded-none), flat solid backgrounds, stark 1px or 2px black borders. Use hard drop shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0a0a0a]) for a neo-brutalist tactile feel.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3333] text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold hover:bg-[#E60000] border-2 border-transparent transition-all hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0a0a0a]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-foreground border-2 border-foreground rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold hover:bg-foreground hover:text-white transition-all
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold hover:bg-[#1DA851] border-2 border-transparent transition-all hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0a0a0a]

sections.description: High-impact typographic hero with dual CTAs.

content.h1: We Build Websites That Work. (And Market Them So People See Them.)
content.subheadline: Fast, custom-designed websites converting clicks into clients.

sections.description: Featured Bento Layout breaking symmetrical grids.

content.headline: Everything You Need to Grow Online. Starting with a Great Website.

cards.title: Custom Website Development
cards.description: Flagship service. Full-width or large span card.

content.headline: Don't Just Take Our Word For It. See What We've Built.
How We Take Your Project From Vision to Launch
Ready for a Website That Actually Grows Your Business?

animation_motion.hover: Tactile interactions. Elements shift up slightly (-translate-y-1) and reveal hard drop shadows.
animation_motion.entrance: Staggered fade-in-up (Framer Motion) for grid items and portfolio cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure layout is intentionally asymmetric, especially in the services section.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Satoshi for body (import via Google Fonts/Fontshare).
Primary CTA buttons MUST use the exact Primary color (#FF3333). Keep secondary services visually muted (gray/off-white backgrounds).
DO NOT use soft drop shadows (no shadow-lg). Use sharp borders and solid offset shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0a0a0a]) for a neo-brutalist aesthetic.
ALL interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.
Never use placehold.it or dummyimage URLs. Only use the provided media URLs.
Build strictly with Tailwind CSS and raw HTML/divs for complex asymmetric layouts rather than rigid Shadcn cards.
Include the WhatsApp button with the recognizable WhatsApp green color where appropriate.
